title: Organize a Real Folder
drDigitalIntro:
Time to practice on your real computer! Download the practice folder from the link below — it contains a messy mix of files (photos, documents, and junk). Your job is to sort them into folders that make sense to you. Here are some ideas: create a 'Photos' folder for images, a 'Documents' folder for text files, and delete anything that looks like junk. There's no single right answer — organize it however makes sense to you!

Download link: (Your instructor will provide a .zip file with practice files)

When you're done, click Continue. We won't check your work — this is real practice for you to keep!
drDigitalSuccess: Great job organizing those files! You now have real experience managing folders on your own computer. The more you practice, the easier it gets.
drDigitalHint: Download the .zip file, unzip it, then create folders and drag files into them. There's no wrong answer — just organize it in a way that makes sense to you.
